question: What signals are encoded in CAN messages?,"SELECT ?signal WHERE { ?signal a dbc:Signal . }"
Which CAN messages are observable on the bus?,"SELECT ?message WHERE { ?message a dbc:Message . }"
How are signals mapped to CAN messages?,"SELECT DISTINCT ?signal ?message WHERE { ?signal a dbc:Signal . ?message dbc:hasSignal ?signal . }"
Which properties are defined for a CAN message?,"SELECT DISTINCT ?property WHERE { ?message a dbc:Message . ?message ?property ?value . }"
Which units are used for signal decoding?,"SELECT DISTINCT ?unit WHERE { ?signal qudt:hasUnit ?unit . }"
Which encoding schemas are used in the system?,"SELECT ?encoding WHERE { ?message dbc:encodedVia ?encoding . }"

Which CAN message contains the highest number of signals?,"SELECT ?message (COUNT(?signal) AS ?signalCount) WHERE { ?message a dbc:Message . ?signal dbc:isPartOf ?message . } GROUP BY ?message ORDER BY DESC(?signalCount) LIMIT 1"
Which signals carry voltage measurements?,"SELECT DISTINCT ?signal WHERE { ?signal qudt:hasUnit ex:V . }"
What signals are part of the BoeningVI CAN message?,"SELECT DISTINCT ?signal WHERE { ?signal dbc:isPartOf ex:BoeningVI . }"
Which CAN message encodes the fire pump pressure signal?,"SELECT DISTINCT ?message WHERE { ?message dbc:hasSignal ex:FirePumpPressure . }"
What is the decoding schema of the Inclination signal?,"SELECT DISTINCT ?encoding ?property ?value WHERE { ex:Inclination dbc:decodedVia ?encoding . ?encoding ?property ?value . }"
Which signals are targeting the Unknown receiver node?,"SELECT DISTINCT ?signal WHERE { ?signal dbc:hasReceiver ex:Unknown . }"
What is the decimal identifier of the bridge battery voltage signal?,"SELECT DISTINCT ?decID WHERE { ex:BridgeBatteryVoltage dbc:isPartOf ?message . ?message dbc:hasDecID ?decID . }"
How are sniffing sensors associated with transmitter nodes?,"SELECT DISTINCT ?sensor ?node WHERE { ?message a dbc:Message ;"  dbc:hasTransmitter ?node . ?sensor sosa:observes ?message . }"""
Which CAN bus platforms are hosting the sniffing sensors?,"SELECT DISTINCT ?platform ?sensor WHERE { ?platform sosa:hosts ?sensor . }"
Which relations link CAN messages to CAN bus platforms?,"SELECT ?message ?platform WHERE { ?message a dbc:Message ;"  sosa:isObservedBy ?sensor . ?sensor sosa:isHostedBy ?platform . }"""
What CAN bus platforms are present in the system?,"SELECT ?platform WHERE { ?platform a sosa:Platform . }"
Which platform hosts the can2_sniffer sensor?,"SELECT DISTINCT ?platform ?sensor WHERE { ?platform sosa:hosts ex:can2_sniffer . }"
Which message identifiers (Hex IDs) are observable on the can2 CAN bus platform?,"SELECT DISTINCT ?hexid WHERE { ?messagelog dbc:observedOn ex:can2 ;"  dbc:hasHexID ?hexid . }"""
Which transmitter nodes are associated with the can2_sniffer sensor?,"SELECT DISTINCT ?transmitter WHERE { ?message dbc:hasTransmitter ?transmitter ;"  sosa:isObservedBy ex:can2_sniffer . }"""
Which types of observations are represented in the system?,"SELECT ?observation WHERE { ?observation rdfs:subClassOf sosa:Observation . }"
What are the core components of a CAN message log?,"SELECT DISTINCT ?properties WHERE { ?messagelog a dbc:MessageLog ;"  ?properties ?value . }"""
How are signal log observations represented in the system?,"SELECT DISTINCT ?properties WHERE { ?signallog a dbc:SignalLog ;"  ?properties ?value . }"""
Which CAN bus platforms carry CAN message logs?,"SELECT DISTINCT ?platform WHERE { ?messagelog dbc:observedOn ?platform . }"

Which measurement units are assigned to the results of signal log observations?,"SELECT DISTINCT ?unit WHERE { ?signallog a dbc:SignalLog ;"  sosa:observedProperty ?signal . ?signal qudt:hasUnit ?unit . }"""

What is the current temperature in the engine room?,"SELECT ?tempvalue (MAX(?timestamp) AS ?latestTime) WHERE { ?templog a dbc:SignalLog ;  sosa:observedProperty ex:EngineRoomTemperature ;  sosa:hasSimpleResult ?tempvalue ;"  sosa:resultTime ?timestamp . } GROUP BY ?tempvalue ORDER BY DESC(?latestTime) LIMIT 1"""

Which message logs were most recently recorded on can2 bus?,"SELECT ?timestamp ?value WHERE { ?log a dbc:MessageLog ;  dbc:observedOn ex:can2 ;  sosa:hasSimpleResult ?value ;"  sosa:resultTime ?timestamp . } ORDER BY DESC(?timestamp) LIMIT 300"""

question: What are encoding schemas of CAN message that observes the highest number of signals?,"SELECT ?message ?encoding WHERE { { SELECT ?message (COUNT(?signal) AS ?count)  WHERE { ?signal dbc:isPartOf ?message . }  GROUP BY ?message  ORDER BY DESC(?count)  LIMIT 1 } ?signal dbc:isPartOf ?message ;"  dbc:decodedVia ?encoding . }"""
